item.title: Who will start at quarterback for the Vikings, Browns and Jets? We made QB1 predictions for all 32 teams
item.description: Will Kirk Cousins go back to Minnesota? Could Kyler Murray join the AFC? Let's predict who will start for every team in the 2026 season.

item.title: Ranking the top offseason trade candidates: Who are the best players potentially available?
item.description: How do Brian Thomas Jr. and Maxx Crosby stack up on the trade market? We break down the latest intel.

item.title: Sources: Johnson to Titans in latest Jets trade
item.description: The Jets are trading pass rusher Jermaine Johnson to the Titans for defensive tackle T'Vondre Sweat, sources told ESPN.

item.title: Top CB prospect McCoy says knee's fully healthy
item.description: Former Vols CB Jermod McCoy says he is fully healed from a right ACL injury and expects to have "no limits" during his upcoming pro day at Tennessee.

item.title: Source: Scherzer returning to Jays for 19th season
item.description: Three-time Cy Young Award winner Max Scherzer has agreed to return to the Blue Jays for his 19th season, a source confirmed to ESPN.
